content: Always read a file before editing it. The Edit tool will fail if old_string doesn't match.
Run the project's existing test suite after making changes. Don't assume changes are correct without verification.
Create focused commits with conventional commit messages. One logical change per commit.
Never commit .env files, credentials, or API keys. Check git diff before committing.
Don't add comments that restate what the code does. Only comment why, not what.
Prefer composition over inheritance. Prefer plain functions over classes when state isn't needed.
